tests.name: kiosk device spotify auth helper builds the device specific spotify auth endpoints
kiosk device spotify auth helper builds the start url with device_id and device_pwd
kiosk device spotify auth helper builds the start url without device_pwd when password is empty
kiosk device spotify auth helper shows a blocking setup state when device spotify auth is missing
kiosk device spotify auth helper opens the device-specific spotify authorize url
kiosk device spotify auth helper opens the popup synchronously before awaiting the auth url request
kiosk device spotify auth helper refreshes and exits setup after a successful auth success message
kiosk device spotify auth helper hides the setup state after a reconnect status refresh succeeds
kiosk device spotify auth helper can render and remove the setup overlay directly
kiosk device spotify auth helper ignores message events that are not SPOTIFY_DEVICE_AUTH_SUCCESS type
kiosk device spotify auth helper ignores message events intended for a different device
kiosk device spotify auth helper removes the message listener when destroy is called
kiosk device spotify auth helper wires the connect button click handler when querySelector finds it
kiosk device spotify auth helper uses body.removeChild when the overlay element has no remove method
kiosk device spotify auth helper escapes html special characters in the setup overlay reason
kiosk branding helpers keeps the fallback text hidden when the logo loads successfully
kiosk branding helpers shows the RadioTEDU text fallback when the logo fails to load
kiosk branding helpers treats already loaded images as loaded during initialization
kiosk branding helpers shows fallback when image is already complete but has zero natural width
kiosk branding helpers sets logo state data attribute and toggles classes correctly for fallback
kiosk branding helpers sets logo state data attribute and toggles classes correctly for loaded
kiosk branding helpers does not throw when setBrandLogoState is called with null params
kiosk branding helpers does not throw when setBrandLogoState receives null element refs
kiosk playback helpers builds an absolute local audio url for local queue items
kiosk playback helpers classifies spotify queue items without touching file_url
kiosk playback helpers syncs the playing view when remote playback is already active for the current now-playing item
kiosk playback helpers syncs the now playing view when only spotifyTrackUri is set even if isPlaying is false
kiosk playback helpers does not sync when both isPlaying and spotifyTrackUri are falsy
kiosk playback helpers returns unsupported plan when spotify source type has no uri
kiosk playback helpers returns unsupported plan when local source has no file_url
kiosk playback helpers returns unsupported plan when file_url is an empty string
kiosk playback helpers does not apply the current- prefix extraction when id is not a string
kiosk playback helpers returns false from shouldSyncNowPlayingView when params is null
kiosk playback helpers uses file_url as-is when it does not start with a slash
kiosk playback helpers extracts song id from current- prefixed id when song_id is absent
kiosk playback helpers keeps spotify queue items out of unsupported-song handling in the kiosk app
kiosk playback helpers mirrors now_playing into the kiosk UI when queue updates arrive after spotify playback has already started
kiosk playback helpers pauses spotify playback before starting a local file
kiosk playback helpers stops local audio before handing off a spotify track
kiosk playback helpers polls spotify state so the 80 percent autoplay rule uses fresh playback progress
kiosk playback helpers detects spotify track end from polled player state when the sdk does not push a final event
kiosk playback helpers starts progress polling immediately after a spotify handoff succeeds
kiosk playback helpers keeps spotify progress polling alive when the sdk reports a paused state for the active spotify song
kiosk playback helpers stores a recoverable spotify auth-required state when kiosk spotify token fetch fails
kiosk playback helpers boots local kiosk services even when spotify auth is missing
kiosk playback helpers persists device setup credentials by redirecting with code and password query params
kiosk playback helpers shows a visible spotify connect action in the startup overlay when device auth is missing
kiosk playback helpers does not fall back to the device setup overlay when spotify setup throws after successful registration
kiosk spotify helpers verifies script element properties when loading the sdk
kiosk spotify helpers calls an existing onSpotifyWebPlaybackSDKReady when the sdk loads
kiosk spotify helpers resolves immediately when the spotify sdk is already loaded
kiosk spotify helpers rejects and resets the load promise when the sdk script fails to load
kiosk spotify helpers loads the Spotify SDK only once and resolves when the ready callback fires
kiosk spotify helpers builds a normalized spotify registration payload
kiosk spotify helpers maps spotify player state into a compact normalized payload
kiosk spotify helpers does not mark track end when previous state has duration_ms null even if track_uri exists
kiosk spotify helpers does not mark track end when same track is near end but not paused at position 0
kiosk spotify helpers does not mark track end when previous position was not near the end
kiosk spotify helpers maps a null state to a fully null track payload
kiosk spotify helpers filters null artist entries out of track_artists
kiosk spotify helpers does not mark track end when previous state has no track_uri
kiosk spotify helpers marks track end when near end and next state has no current track
kiosk spotify helpers marks track end when the same song resets after reaching the end
kiosk spotify helpers creates a spotify player wrapper that wires sdk callbacks
kiosk spotify helpers tracks last device id from the ready event via getLastDeviceId
kiosk spotify helpers wrapper methods delegate to the underlying sdk player
kiosk spotify helpers passes the volume option to the sdk player config
kiosk spotify helpers fires error callbacks for sdk error events
